_comment: Asset library — data-driven props/furniture Claude can drop into a scene via kohai_asset. Each entry maps a logical name to an SVG file and default placement hints.

water-bottle.description: Water bottle she can hold or place beside her — use for hydration reminders.

mug.description: Steaming coffee/tea mug. Use for cozy late-night vibes.

plush.description: Bunny plush. Use when she's cuddling, comforting herself, or sulking.

blanket.description: Folded blanket. Use when she's curled up, sleepy, or sick.

snack.description: Onigiri on a tray. Use for eat/break reminders.
